evals.prompt: Please read the PPTX file 'Selling the Premium in Freemium.pptx' and provide a comprehensive summary of the presentation. What are the main topics, key arguments, and key takeaways?
evals.expected_output: A detailed summary covering the freemium business model, its advantages/disadvantages, and strategic implications discussed in the presentation

assertions.name: contains_freemium_definition
assertions.description: Summary includes clear explanation of the freemium model

assertions.name: mentions_advantages
assertions.description: Discusses advantages of the freemium approach

assertions.name: mentions_challenges
assertions.description: Mentions challenges or disadvantages of freemium

assertions.name: response_length
assertions.description: Summary is substantial (at least 300 words) and well-structured

evals.prompt: Based on the PPTX file 'Selling the Premium in Freemium.pptx', what are the key success factors or metrics for implementing a successful freemium business model? What does the presentation recommend?
evals.expected_output: A detailed answer explaining the success factors, strategies, and recommendations for freemium models as discussed in the presentation

assertions.name: identifies_success_factors
assertions.description: Lists specific success factors mentioned in the presentation

assertions.name: mentions_metrics
assertions.description: Discusses key metrics or KPIs for freemium success

assertions.name: cites_presentation_content
assertions.description: References actual content and examples from the slides

evals.prompt: Extract the main points and key insights from 'Selling the Premium in Freemium.pptx' and generate a new PPTX presentation that summarizes these insights in a concise, well-formatted manner. The new presentation should be easy to reference and visually organized.
evals.expected_output: A newly generated PPTX file containing organized key insights and main points from the original presentation

assertions.name: pptx_generated
assertions.description: A PPTX file is successfully generated

assertions.name: contains_key_insights
assertions.description: Generated presentation includes key insights from the original

assertions.name: well_organized
assertions.description: Slides are logically organized and easy to follow

assertions.name: professional_format
assertions.description: Generated PPTX looks professional and is easy to read
